title: Executive director to furnish forms
doc_html:
SUBPART C. EMPLOYMENT CERTIFICATES

§181. Secretary to furnish forms

           The secretary shall prescribe and furnish all forms to be used in connection with the issuance of employment certificates by each issuing authority.

           Acts 2008, No. 743, §7.
doc_text:
SUBPART C.  EMPLOYMENT CERTIFICATES
§181.  Secretary to furnish forms
The secretary shall prescribe and furnish all forms to be used in
connection with the issuance of employment certificates by each issuing
authority.
Acts 2008, No. 743, §7.
